testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerGenerateExecutionReportWithNonExistentSession
testcase.system-out: 18:00:05.950 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:05.970 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Generating execution report for session session-123

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerGetVirtualThreadExecutor
testcase.system-out: 18:00:05.993 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithEmptyContext
testcase.system-out: 18:00:05.999 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:05.999 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 18:00:06.000 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Local stream is empty for session session-123, treating as new worker

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithToolResult
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.004 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.006 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 18:00:06.006 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Last message contains ToolResult, session session-123 is resuming from suspension

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerRunWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.030 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.031 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunner starting for session null

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerRunWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.034 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.035 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner starting for session null

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerShutdown
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.038 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.039 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Shutting down WorkerRunner thread executor

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerRunWithValidSessionNewWorker
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.043 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.075 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner starting for session session-123 18:00:06.075 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 18:00:06.075 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Local stream is empty for session session-123, treating as new worker 18:00:06.075 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner for session session-123 is resuming from suspension: false 18:00:06.075 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- New worker session, performing initialization 18:00:06.076 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Initial context injected for session session-123 18:00:06.076 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Starting ReAct loop for session session-123 18:00:06.076 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- ReAct loop iteration 1 for session session-123 18:00:06.076 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- CircuitBreaker check passed for iteration 1 18:00:06.077 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Fetched 0 messages from local stream 18:00:06.077 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Calling LLM for ReAct iteration 1 18:00:06.077 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- LLM response received: hasToolCalls=false, isTextOnly=true 18:00:06.077 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Appended LLM response to local stream 18:00:06.077 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- No more tool calls, task completed for session session-123 18:00:06.077 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Calling CondensationEngine for session session-123 18:00:06.078 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner completed successfully for session session-123 18:00:06.078 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner ReAct loop completed for session session-123 after 1 iterations

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithMixedMessage
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.090 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.091 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 18:00:06.091 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Last message contains ToolResult, session session-123 is resuming from suspension

testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.104 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerGetVirtualThreadExecutor

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerRunWithValidSessionResumingWorker
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.113 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.114 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner starting for session session-123 18:00:06.115 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 18:00:06.115 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Last message contains ToolResult, session session-123 is resuming from suspension 18:00:06.115 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner for session session-123 is resuming from suspension: true 18:00:06.115 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Resuming from suspension, skipping initialization 18:00:06.115 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Starting ReAct loop for session session-123 18:00:06.115 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- ReAct loop iteration 1 for session session-123 18:00:06.115 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- CircuitBreaker check passed for iteration 1 18:00:06.115 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Fetched 1 messages from local stream 18:00:06.115 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Calling LLM for ReAct iteration 1 18:00:06.116 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- LLM response received: hasToolCalls=false, isTextOnly=true 18:00:06.116 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Appended LLM response to local stream 18:00:06.116 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- No more tool calls, task completed for session session-123 18:00:06.116 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Calling CondensationEngine for session session-123 18:00:06.116 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner completed successfully for session session-123 18:00:06.116 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunner ReAct loop completed for session session-123 after 1 iterations

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithTextMessage
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.119 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.120 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session session-123 is resuming from suspension 18:00:06.120 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Last message does not contain ToolResult, treating session session-123 as new worker

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerShutdown
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.122 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- MasterRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.123 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.MasterRunnerImpl -- Shutting down MasterRunner virtual thread executor

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerGenerateExecutionReport
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.130 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.131 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Generating execution report for session session-123 18:00:06.131 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Execution report generated for session session-123

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerGenerateExecutionPlan

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerGenerateExecutionPlanWithWrongStatus

testcase.name: testMasterRunnerRunWithValidSession
testMasterRunnerGenerateExecutionPlanWithNonExistentSession

testcase.name: testWorkerRunnerIsResumingFromSuspensionWithNullSessionId
testcase.system-out: 18:00:06.162 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- WorkerRunnerImpl initialized with thread pool executor 18:00:06.162 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.runner.impl.WorkerRunnerImpl -- Checking if session null is resuming from suspension
